raw.question: Show me all users limit 1
raw.expectedSql: SELECT * FROM users LIMIT 1

raw.question: Who is Alice?
raw.generatedSql: SELECT name FROM users WHERE name = 'Alice' LIMIT 100
raw.expectedSql: SELECT * FROM users WHERE name = 'Alice'

raw.question: List all products under $15
raw.generatedSql: SELECT name FROM products WHERE price < 15.00 LIMIT 100
raw.expectedSql: SELECT * FROM products WHERE price < 15

raw.question: Find pending orders
raw.generatedSql: SELECT * FROM orders WHERE status = 'pending' LIMIT 100
raw.expectedSql: SELECT * FROM orders WHERE status = 'pending'

raw.question: Total revenue
raw.generatedSql: SELECT SUM(total_amount) AS total_revenue FROM orders LIMIT 200
raw.expectedSql: SELECT SUM(total_amount) FROM orders WHERE status = 'completed'

raw.question: How many products do we have?
raw.expectedSql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM products

raw.question: Average order value
raw.generatedSql: SELECT AVG(total_amount) AS average_order_value FROM orders LIMIT 200
raw.expectedSql: SELECT AVG(total_amount) FROM orders

raw.question: Total stock across all products
raw.generatedSql: SELECT SUM(stock_quantity) AS total_stock FROM products LIMIT 200
raw.expectedSql: SELECT SUM(stock_quantity) FROM products

raw.question: What did Alice order?
raw.generatedSql: SELECT DISTINCT p.name AS product_name FROM users u JOIN orders o ON u.id = o.user_id JOIN order_items oi ON o.id = oi.order_id JOIN products p ON oi.product_id = p.id WHERE u.name = 'Alice' LIMIT 200
raw.expectedSql: SELECT orders.* FROM orders JOIN users ON orders.user_id = users.id WHERE users.name = 'Alice'

raw.question: List items in order 1
raw.generatedSql: SELECT products.name FROM products ORDER BY id LIMIT 100
raw.expectedSql: SELECT products.name, order_items.quantity FROM order_items JOIN products ON order_items.product_id = products.id WHERE order_items.order_id = 1

raw.question: Who bought a Widget?
raw.generatedSql: SELECT DISTINCT users.name FROM users JOIN orders ON users.id = orders.user_id JOIN order_items ON orders.id = order_items.order_id JOIN products ON order_items.product_id = products.id WHERE products.name = 'Widget' LIMIT 200
raw.expectedSql: SELECT DISTINCT users.name FROM users JOIN orders ON users.id = orders.user_id JOIN order_items ON orders.id = order_items.order_id JOIN products ON order_items.product_id = products.id WHERE products.name = 'Widget'

raw.question: Total revenue per user
raw.generatedSql: SELECT users.name AS user_name, SUM(orders.total_amount) AS total_revenue FROM users JOIN orders ON users.id = orders.user_id GROUP BY users.id ORDER BY total_revenue DESC LIMIT 100
raw.expectedSql: SELECT users.name, SUM(orders.total_amount) FROM users JOIN orders ON users.id = orders.user_id GROUP BY users.name

raw.question: Orders from today
raw.generatedSql: SELECT * FROM orders WHERE strftime('%Y-%m-%d', created_at) = date('now') LIMIT 100
raw.expectedSql: SELECT * FROM orders WHERE date(created_at) = date('now')

raw.question: Users who joined this month
raw.generatedSql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM users WHERE strftime('%Y-%m', created_at) = strftime('%Y-%m', 'now') LIMIT 200
raw.expectedSql: SELECT * FROM users WHERE strftime('%Y-%m', created_at) = strftime('%Y-%m', 'now')

raw.question: Orders placed in the last 7 days
raw.generatedSql: SELECT * FROM orders WHERE created_at >= date('now','-7 days') LIMIT 100
raw.expectedSql: SELECT * FROM orders WHERE created_at >= date('now', '-7 days')

raw.question: Revenue this year
raw.generatedSql: SELECT SUM(total_amount) FROM orders WHERE strftime('%Y', created_at) = strftime('%Y', 'now') LIMIT 200
raw.expectedSql: SELECT SUM(total_amount) FROM orders WHERE strftime('%Y', created_at) = strftime('%Y', 'now')
